articles.title: US stocks today: Nasdaq plunges 2% as tech earnings spark AI spending worries
articles.description: Wall Street closed sharply lower with Nasdaq down over 2% as weak Big Tech earnings and rising AI spending concerns hit sentiment. Surging oil prices above $100, driven by Middle East tensions, reignited inflation fears and pushed bond yields higher, overshadowing gains in defense stocks like Lockheed Martin.

articles.title: Tech Stocks Tumble Amid AI Spending Concerns and Rising Oil Prices
articles.description: Wall Street indices ended lower with Nasdaq dropping over 2% amid concerns over heavy AI spending and inflation driven by soaring oil prices. Middle East tensions and the first reports from major tech companies contributed to market volatility. The Federal Reserve's upcoming policy meeting heightens inflation worries.

articles.title: See how oil prices soared after attacks in Red Sea, more US strikes
articles.description: Fears over oil shipment constraints triggered by the US-Iran war have sent crude oil prices soaring. What will happen next?

articles.title: Dollar Rises on Houthi Tanker Attack and Higher Oil Prices
articles.description: The dollar index (DXY00 ) on Thursday rose by +0.35%. The dollar found support from strong US interest rate differentials, as the 10-year T-note yield rose by +4 bp and posted a new 1.5-year high amid Thursday's surge in oil prices of more than +6%....

articles.title: Tensions Surge: Oil Prices Break $100 Amid Global Supply Disruptions
articles.description: Oil prices rose above $100 for the first time since May after Yemeni Houthis attacked Saudi oil tankers, disrupting supply in the Red Sea and Strait of Hormuz. Brent crude hit its highest close since May 22, while geopolitical tensions and possible OPEC+ output increases create market uncertainties.

articles.title: Mortgage rate climbs above 6.50% to the highest level in months
articles.description: The average long-term U.S. mortgage rate climbed this week to its highest level in nearly 12 months, pushing up borrowing costs for prospective homebuyers at a time when rising oil prices are already squeezing household budgets

articles.title: Oil Prices Surge as Red Sea and Hormuz Risks Mount
articles.description: Oil prices surge to six-week highs as Houthi threats in the Red Sea and rising tensions in the Strait of Hormuz fuel fears of global supply disruptions.

articles.title: Nat-Gas Prices Fade Mildly But See Support from Hotter US Weather Forecasts
articles.description: August Nymex natural gas (NGQ26 ) on Thursday closed down -0.009 (-0.31%), giving back part of Wednesday's rally of +2.09%. Nat-gas prices fell back as US natural gas inventories rose by more than the 5-year average. Also on the bearish side was con...

articles.title: Tech Earnings and Oil Prices Send U.S. Stocks into Freefall
articles.description: U.S. stocks fell sharply with the Nasdaq down over 2% following disappointing reports from major tech firms like Alphabet and Tesla. Rising oil prices further stoked inflation fears, impacting bond yields and investors' sentiment. The market remains volatile as geopolitical tensions and economic concerns persist.

articles.title: Oil Prices Soar as US-Iran Conflict Expands to Red Sea
